content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic reward mechanisms (from ICM/RND curious agent frameworks) can be repurposed to prioritize the compression and long-term retention of active learning agent memory, solving the 2024-2025 SOTA challenge of catastrophic forgetting of high-value unlabeled data representations. This creates a self-organizing memory hierarchy where the agent automatically retains the most information-dense, surprising samples that boost future active learning performance without manual memory pruning.
